query:
SELECT 
  g.id as group_id,
  g.name as group_name,
  COUNT(w.id) as worker_count
FROM `groups` g
LEFT JOIN workers w ON g.id = w.group_id
GROUP BY g.id, g.name
ORDER BY g.id;
